element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Lecture from Detective Frank Harris, bail payment mechanics
Bail payment, pawn shop trades, Las Vegas stash building
Item trading and purchasing with nickels
Date arrangement hub for Holli Would
Arranging date as prerequisite for apartment climb
Vertical platforming gauntlet requiring prior date arrangement
Candy collection and consumption to gain entry restrictions

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe locations (bank, pawn shop, Slash Club)
typical_tension_triggers: Getting arrested and facing bail consequences
Attempting vertical climb of Holli's apartment
Running low on bail payment currency
Failing apartment climb and being tossed back to ground
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Exploration-based tension with spike at apartment-building climax; cycle between safe hub-world navigation and hostile avoidance encounters

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Currency collection optional for bail avoidance; side locations (pawn shop, malt shop) are optional exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like avoidance of Popper Police; introduction to arrest/bail system; encouraged exploration of hub world
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Currency farming phase in Las Vegas; item acquisition from pawn shop; date arrangement prerequisite puzzle
difficulty_curve.late_game: Apartment building exterior vertical platforming gauntlet; fail state sends player back to ground zero requiring re-climb
notable_spikes: First arrest by Popper Police introduces consequence system
Holli's apartment climb: vertical platforming challenge with fail-state reset to ground level

notable_level_patterns.description: Player navigates between interconnected safe locations (Las Vegas, bank, pawn shop, Slash Club, malt shop) collecting currency and items while avoiding Popper Police encounters in transit zones
Access to final challenge (Holli date/apartment) requires prior completion of collectible chains (date arrangement at Slash Club, candy collection for malt shop)
Final challenge is vertical platforming ascent with punitive fail state (reset to ground) that forces replay if player falls
